description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with exaggerated, elongated limbs and body parts, resulting in an abstract and surreal appearance. The head is relatively small and features glasses, while the torso and arms are stretched and twisted, merging into angular, planar extensions that dominate the form. The legs are similarly elongated and bent at unnatural angles, with the feet appearing blocky and simplified. The surface of the figure is covered in a glossy, reflective texture with swirling, iridescent patterns, giving it a metallic and almost digital look. Clothing details are difficult to discern due to the distortion, but the figure appears to be wearing a dress or skirt and shoes. The overall form is highly non-anthropomorphic, with sharp edges and a fragmented, almost crystalline structure.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, angular extensions, and a glossy, iridescent surface. The form is abstract, with glasses and hints of a dress or skirt.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face with glasses, a twisted torso, and arms and legs stretched into sharp, angular planes.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the extreme elongation of the arms and the planar, wing-like extensions from the back.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the angular, reflective surfaces and the unnatural bending of the legs.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the head turned to the side, with the body and limbs forming a fragmented, crystalline silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length dress with short sleeves and glasses
attribute_posture: dynamic, twisted stance with limbs extended
